source.ref: suksma - Rovastar - Sunflower Passion (Enlightment Mix)_Phat_edit + flexi und martin shaders - circumflex in character classes in regular expression

display.name: Suksma - Sunflower Passion
display.author: Suksma + Rovastar
display.blurb: A sunflower opens at the speed of music — heliotropic and golden.

annotation.technical_notes: A complex per-pixel warp shader drives a recursive fractal zoom feedback loop through sampler_main, mimicking a dynamic Julia set. Low decay rates allow the warped iterations to accumulate into dense, self-similar structures. High-energy bass transients in the music trigger sudden zoom steps and rotate the coordinate space, while treble transients modulate the highly saturated color lookup.
